title: MCP server not executable as standalone tool
evidence: main.go:89 calls server.ServeStdio(s) requiring stdin/stdout transport; no HTTP server or daemon mode available
suggestion: The implementation follows MCP stdio transport correctly, but verify integration with actual LLM clients

title: Data source integration incomplete
evidence: main.go:21-28 defaults to relative 'data/kaggle' path; no support for configuring alternative data sources or optional APIs (API-Football, TheSportsDB)
suggestion: Add environment variables or config file for external API integration

title: Match query capability fully implemented
evidence: tools/matches.go:18-54 implements search_matches (by team/season/competition/date), head_to_head (comparative records), biggest_wins; tests in tools_test.go verify all scenarios

title: Team statistics and ranking
evidence: tools/teams.go:17-47 implements team_stats (wins/losses/goals by season/competition/venue) and top_teams (ranking by points/wins/goals); comprehensive test coverage

title: Player search and filtering
evidence: tools/players.go:17-39 implements search_players (by name/nationality/club/position/overall) and club_players (squad listing); test TestSearchPlayers_Brazilian passes

title: Competition standings and statistics
evidence: tools/competitions.go:17-47 implements standings (by season), list_seasons, match_stats_summary (goals/home-win rate); tests verify 2019 Brasileirão champion calculation

title: Team name normalization edge cases
evidence: data/data.go:94-99 normalizes state suffixes (' - STATE', '-STATE') and accents; TestNormalizeTeam passes basic cases but no test for multi-word team names with variations
suggestion: Add test cases for team name aliases (e.g., 'Flamengo' vs 'Flamengo-RJ' vs 'Clube de Regatas Flamengo')

title: Date format handling
evidence: data/data.go handles ISO (2023-09-24), Brazilian (29/03/2003), and timestamp formats; TestParseDate passes

title: UTF-8 character encoding
evidence: data/data.go:14 imports golang.org/x/text/unicode/norm for accent handling; TestRemoveAccents demonstrates Brazilian Portuguese character support (São Paulo, Grêmio, Avaí)

title: All 6 CSV files loadable and queryable
evidence: data/data.go LoadStore loads BrasileiraoMatches (4180), CupMatches (1337), LibertadoresMatches (1255), BRFootballMatches (10296), HistoricalMatches (6886), Players (18207); test output confirms all datasets in memory

title: Sample query coverage
evidence: tools_test.go includes 15 test functions covering match search, head-to-head, team stats, standings, player search; examples given in TASK.md only partially validated by test suite
suggestion: Add explicit test cases for 20+ sample questions from TASK.md section 'Sample Questions and Expected Behaviors'

title: Cross-file query support
evidence: tools implement queries spanning match data (all 5 match files) + player data (FIFA); TestTeamStats and TestSearchPlayers demonstrate combined usage

title: No explicit query performance benchmarking
evidence: Tools execute queries in-memory; test output shows completion in <1s for sample queries, but no formal SLA validation (spec requires <2s simple, <5s aggregate)
suggestion: Add benchmark tests to validate performance SLAs in spec

title: MCP resource listing implemented
evidence: main.go:58-86 adds soccer://datasets resource listing loaded dataset counts; goes beyond spec (informational bonus)
suggestion: Consider adding more MCP resources (e.g., available_tools, documentation)
